headline: IT Systems / Cloud Administrator | M365 • Azure AD (Entra) • Intune • SCCM • VMware/Hyper‑V
about:
I'm a dedicated IT professional with a strong background in cloud technologies, automation, systems administration, and end-user support across diverse platforms and environments. With hands-on experience in both IaaS and SaaS, I specialize in resolving technical issues efficiently to minimize downtime and ensure business continuity.

My expertise includes managing Microsoft Azure, AWS, and Linux environments, along with on-premises Active Directory, Azure Active Directory, Microsoft 365, networking, and remote monitoring tools. I focus on maintaining stable and secure IT infrastructures while delivering reliable operational support.

I take pride in providing responsive, customer-focused service while maintaining a proactive approach to troubleshooting, automation, and infrastructure optimization.

Driven by a passion for technology and continuous learning, I strive to bridge the gap between clients and complex IT infrastructure by delivering clear communication, dependable support, and scalable cloud solutions.

highlights.title: Improved device turnaround by 30%
highlights.detail: Streamlined depot intake and imaging with automation (PowerShell/Intune).

highlights.title: Reduced ticket MTTR
highlights.detail: Standardized KBs & runbooks; leveraged Intune compliance & MEM reporting.

recommendations.quote: Devansh is reliable and proactive—great at cross‑functional collaboration.
recommendations.author: Shweta Gautam

recommendations.quote: Strong ownership and excellent customer focus in resolving M365 issues.
recommendations.author: Jitendra
